---
name: ✨ Feature / Task
about: Propose a new project milestone or technical task.
title: "[TASK] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Is your feature request related to a project milestone?**
(e.g., Data Preprocessing, Model Training, Visualization)

**Describe the task**
What exactly needs to be implemented?

**Technical Approach**
How do you plan to solve this? (Libraries used, logic, etc.)

**Definition of Done**

- [ ] Feature implemented
- [ ] Unit tests passed
- [ ] Documentation updated
